name: smart-test-select
description: Instead of running the whole suite on every PR, analyze the diff's dependency graph and propose the minimal set of tests actually at risk — with an LLM fallback for dynamic-import edge cases the static graph can't resolve.
author: Ilya Tsvirov

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --clean --external ts-morph --external commander --external typescript && tsup src/cli.ts --format esm --external ts-morph --external commander --external typescript
